title: Automatically update activities with phone call from app
excerpt: Hello - When we make a call to a lead in the CRM through the app, is there a way to have that phone call automatically recorded as an activity? Or an update?

posts.author: dafinney12 (David Finney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello - When we make a call to a lead in the CRM through the app, is there a way to have that phone call automatically recorded as an activity? Or an update?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Not that I know of with the CRM as it stands. There is an integration with Aircall that will do that.

posts.author: themondaymaster (The Monday Master)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey David, when making a phone call from monday CRM mobile, upon completion of the call it’ll prompt you to input notes from the call and log it quickly. See my video below
